meta.importedFrom: Unit 2 Passage 1 You just don't get me!（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版八年级下册.html

article.title: You just don't get me!
article.summary: 围绕误解与沟通，学习如何理解他人与表达自己。

sentences.text: [Mum is sitting in the living room, worried.]
sentences.d: 'worried' 是形容词作伴随状语，描述妈妈的状态。
It is + 时间点，用于表达当前时间。

sentences.text: [The son runs through the door, out of breath.]
sentences.g: 一般现在时 + 介词短语
sentences.d: 'out of breath' 意为上气不接下气，形容状态。
助动词 Do + 主语 + 动词原形。

sentences.text: I promised to be back before 9 tonight.
sentences.d: 'promised to do sth' 承诺做某事。'before 9 tonight' 是时间状语。
意为'协议就是协议'，强调遵守承诺。

sentences.text: The promise wasn't kept, so you can't stay out late next time.
sentences.tr: 你没遵守承诺，所以下次不能在外面待这么晚了。
sentences.g: 被动语态 + 因果复句
sentences.d: 'wasn't kept' 是被动语态。'so' 引导结果状语从句。
'was heading back' 表示过去某个时间点正在进行的动作。

sentences.text: On my way back, I realised that my phone was at Jiacheng's house.
sentences.tr: 在回来的路上，我意识到我的手机落在嘉诚家了。

sentences.text: I had to go back to get it.
sentences.d: 'had to' 是 'have to' 的过去式，表示不得不。

sentences.text: Why did it take that long to get your phone?
sentences.tr: 拿个手机为什么要花那么长时间？
sentences.g: It takes sb some time to do sth
sentences.d: 固定句型，表示做某事花费时间。

sentences.text: Halfway back, I noticed an old woman under a street lamp.
sentences.tr: 半路上，我注意到路灯下有位老妇人。

sentences.text: She was wearing a thin blouse and it was cold.
sentences.tr: 她穿着单薄的衬衫，天气很冷。
sentences.g: 过去进行时 + 并列句
sentences.d: 描述当时的状态和环境。

sentences.text: I asked her if she needed help.
sentences.d: if引导宾语从句，表示'是否'。
口语中常用陈述语序加升调表示疑问。

sentences.text: She couldn't tell me her address.
I checked and saw that a yellow band was attached to her wrist.
sentences.tr: 我检查发现她手腕上系着一条黄带子。

sentences.text: It had her information on it.
But I couldn't call her family without my phone.
sentences.tr: 但没有手机我联系不上她的家人。
sentences.d: 'without my phone' 表示条件或伴随。

sentences.text: So I gave her my jacket and took her to the nearest police station.
sentences.tr: 所以我把夹克给了她，带她去了最近的警察局。

sentences.text: I waited with her until she was taken home by a policewoman.
sentences.tr: 我陪她一直等到一位女警把她送回家。
sentences.d: 'waited with her' 陪她等。'until' 引导时间状语从句。

sentences.text: After that I ran to pick up my phone and came home.
sentences.tr: 之后我跑去拿手机然后回家了。

sentences.text: I'm sorry for being cross with you.
sentences.d: 'be cross with sb' 对某人生气。

sentences.text: But why didn't you phone me from the police station?
sentences.tr: 但你为什么不在警察局给我打个电话呢？
sentences.d: 'Why didn't you...' 责备或询问原因。

readingQuestions.stem: Why was the son late coming home?
options: A. He was playing games at Jiacheng's house.
C. He helped a lost old woman and went back for his phone.
D. He was held up by the police.
readingQuestions.answer: C. He helped a lost old woman and went back for his phone.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中提到儿子先是帮助了一位迷路的老妇人，然后又跑回去拿手机，所以迟到了。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did the son go back to Jiacheng's house?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中儿子说：'I realised that my phone was at Jiacheng’s house. I had to go back to get it.'

readingQuestions.stem: How did the son know the old woman's information?
options: B. From a yellow band on her wrist.
readingQuestions.answer: B. From a yellow band on her wrist.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中提到：'I checked to see that a yellow band was attached to her wrist. It had her information on it.'

readingQuestions.stem: Why was the mother angry at the beginning?
options: A. The son lost his phone.
B. The son failed an exam.
C. The son broke his promise and came home late.
D. The son didn't eat dinner.
readingQuestions.answer: C. The son broke his promise and came home late.
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 妈妈说：'The promise wasn’t kept, so you can’t stay out late next time.' 说明她生气是因为儿子没守约迟到了。

readingQuestions.stem: How did the mother feel at the end of the story?
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文章最后一句妈妈说：'I’m very proud of you.'
